/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/freeusd_schema_tokens_bundle_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/freeusd_schema_tokens_bundle_test.dir/tests/schema_tokens_bundle_test.cpp.o -o freeusd_schema_tokens_bundle_test  src/libfreeusd_usd.a src/libfreeusd_pcp.a src/libfreeusd_ar.a src/libfreeusd_io.a src/libfreeusd_sdf.a src/libfreeusd_vt.a src/libfreeusd_tf.a
